---
title: "NZ Migration: Fact or Fiction"
subtitle: "Political claims tested against monthly data from Statistics NZ"
---

---

## The Kiwi Exodus

Net NZ citizen migration turned sharply negative after 2022. The shaded band shows the pre-COVID historical average ± 1 standard deviation.

```{=html}
{{< include data/kiwi-exodus_main.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — rolling 12-month sum.</p>

Australian citizens are shown for comparison — Australia absorbs most departing Kiwis under the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement.

```{=html}
{{< include data/kiwi-exodus_split.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — rolling 12-month sum.</p>

---

## India's Rising Share

India has moved from around 5th to the #1 source country over the past decade. Each line tracks a country's annual arrivals ranking (rank 1 = most arrivals).

```{=html}
{{< include data/india-surge_bump.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — annual arrivals, non-NZ citizens.</p>

India's share of non-NZ arrivals on a 12-month rolling average.

```{=html}
{{< include data/india-surge_share.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM552301 — rolling 12-month average.</p>

---

## The Visa Mix Shift

Student and work visa arrivals surged after the border reopened in 2022. The second chart shows the same breakdown for arrivals whose last permanent residence was India.

```{=html}
{{< include data/visa-shift_overall.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM552201 — monthly arrivals by visa type.</p>

```{=html}
{{< include data/visa-shift_india_clpr.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM553001 — arrivals where Country of Last Permanent Residence = India.</p>

---

## Where They Land

Net migration since 2022 is negative across every Territorial Authority — the Kiwi exodus has outpaced inbound migration at the local level. Auckland and Wellington show the largest net outflows. The map shows cumulative net migration by TA since January 2022.

```{=html}
{{< include data/where-they-land_map.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM553701 — net migration by NZ area, 12/16-month rule.</p>

The TAs with the least and most net outflow over the most recent 12 months.

```{=html}
{{< include data/where-they-land_top_bottom.html >}}
```

<p class="data-source">Source: Statistics NZ ITM553701 — net migration by NZ area, 12/16-month rule.</p>

---

<p class="data-source">
Data: Statistics NZ International Travel and Migration, 12/16-month rule.
Built by <a href="https://autonomousecon.substack.com">Autonomous Econ</a> |
<a href="https://github.com/martingeew/nz_migration_streamlit">Source code</a>
</p>
